final_decision.exact_quote: To block a Bot from your entire website, add this to the robots.txt file in your top-level directory. Please do this for every subdomain that you wish to opt out from. An example of this is:
final_decision.justification: [NORMAL_FAQ] grounded generation; retrieval_score=0.91; verifier=pass; product_area_snapped=Claude->privacy; exact_quote_source=deterministic_fallback
final_decision.response: To block a Bot from your entire website, you need to add specific directives to your robots.txt file. For example, you can use the following: User-agent: ClaudeBot Disallow: /. This should be done for every subdomain that you wish to opt out from. Additionally, you can use the Crawl-delay extension to limit crawling activity, such as: User-agent: ClaudeBot Crawl-delay: 1. Please note that alternate methods like blocking IP addresses may not work correctly or persistently.
